notes: Used for Kaiser Permanente case management; HCL Software acquired Notes/Domino from IBM in 2018
Continuous speech recognition for radiology dictation; discontinued; Dragon Medical (Nuance) became market leader
Clinical trials management for pharma; IBM later exited clinical trials software market
Internet-based health information portal for health plan members; discontinued in early 2000s
Systems management framework; Tivoli acquired by IBM 1996; rebranded IBM Tivoli; still active
Aberdeen discusses next-generation healthcare IS adoption; EHR became mandated under HITECH 2009
Legacy system integration and enterprise patient data consolidation; evolved into broader HIE market
Client-server RDBMS adoption in healthcare; replaced proprietary mainframe/minicomputer systems
